hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Mute Swan in the wild
hero.caption: The Mute Swan is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.fileTitle: File:Mute swan (Cygnus olor) looking for food in waves, Windermere, England.jpg
habitat.alt: A Mute Swan navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Mute Swan finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Mute Swan.

baby.fileTitle: File:Mute swan (Cygnus olor) in Bowness-on-Windermere, England.jpg
baby.alt: A young or baby Mute Swan showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Mute Swans must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Mute Swans interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Mute Swans interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Mute Swan traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.fileTitle: File:093 Wild Mute swan at Lake Geneva during sunset Photo by Giles Laurent.jpg
size.alt: A photo showing the size of a Mute Swan
size.caption: The size of a Mute Swan can vary depending on its age and environment.

closeup.fileTitle: File:Mute swan cygnet pontoon in Prospect Park (80364).jpg
closeup.alt: A detailed close-up showing the physical features of a Mute Swan
closeup.caption: A close-up view reveals the intricate details of a Mute Swan's body.

fun-fact.fileTitle: File:092 Wild Mute swan in flight at Lake Geneva during golden hour of sunset Photo by Giles Laurent.jpg
fun-fact.alt: A Mute Swan showing a unique behavior or adaptation
fun-fact.caption: Did you know that the Mute Swan has amazing features that help it survive?
